user.title: Arctic Spa
user.description: Set up your Arctic Spa hot tub.

data_description.host: Spa controller's local IP (DHCP-reserve it for stability).
data_description.temperature_unit: Display unit for temperature sensors (does not change the spa's internal setting).
data_description.entity_prefix: Used as the prefix for every entity ID this integration creates. Default 'arctic_spa' → sensor.arctic_spa_water_temperature etc. Use snake_case. Cannot be changed without deleting and re-adding the integration.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the spa. Make sure it is powered on and connected to your network.
